title: danthonia rigida
intro: Danthonia rigida, also known as Stipa rigida, is a type of grass native to North America, commonly found in dry prairies and grasslands. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Danthonia rigida include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve skin health, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water to create a tea or by drying and powdering the plant material for use in tinctures and salves.
